---
title: Brand 5
engine: knitr
brand:
  color:
    palette:
      steel-grey: "#6b7b8d"
      charcoal-slate: "#3d4a5c"
      silver-mist: "#9eaab8"
      ice-blue: "#5a8fa8"
      graphite: "#4a4f57"
    background:
      dark: "#16181c"
      light: "#f5f6f8"
    foreground:
      dark: "#a0b0c0"
      light: "#3c4650"
    dark:
      dark: "#16181c"
      light: "#3c4650"
    light:
      dark: "#a0b0c0"
      light: "#f5f6f8"
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Montserrat
        source: bunny
      - family: Inter
        source: bunny
      - family: Space Mono
        source: bunny
    base: Inter
    headings: Montserrat
    monospace: Space Mono
---

{{< include /brands/_r.qmd >}}
